error.message: The server principal "coats_automation" is not able to access the database "P21Import" under the current security context.

scripts.text:
USE P21Import;
SET NOCOUNT ON;

SELECT result_set = 'capture_runs', *
FROM dbo.coats_mexico_manual_pipeline_capture_run
WHERE capture_run_uid <> 2
ORDER BY capture_run_uid;

;WITH latest AS
(
    SELECT TOP (1) capture_run_uid
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_manual_pipeline_capture_run
    WHERE capture_run_uid <> 2
      AND capture_phase = 'CAPTURE_AFTER_CONTAINER_RECEIPT_APPROVAL'
    ORDER BY capture_run_uid DESC
)
SELECT result_set = 'latest_after_approval_counts', r.entity_name, row_count = COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.coats_mexico_manual_pipeline_capture_row AS r
JOIN latest AS l ON l.capture_run_uid = r.capture_run_uid
GROUP BY r.entity_name
ORDER BY r.entity_name;

;WITH latest AS
(
    SELECT TOP (1) capture_run_uid, container_name
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_manual_pipeline_capture_run
    WHERE capture_run_uid <> 2
      AND capture_phase = 'CAPTURE_AFTER_CONTAINER_RECEIPT_APPROVAL'
    ORDER BY capture_run_uid DESC
)
SELECT result_set = 'manual_current_header_chain'
     , cb.container_building_uid, cb.container_name, cb.location_id, cb.row_status_flag AS cb_row_status_flag
     , vh.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid, vh.vessel_receipt_number, vh.row_status_flag AS vh_row_status_flag, vh.vessel_name, vh.departure_date, vh.arrival_date, vh.receipt_date
     , vc.vessel_receipts_container_uid, vc.row_status_flag AS vc_row_status_flag, vc.container_building_uid AS vc_container_building_uid, vc.expected_arrival_date, vc.received_date
     , crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid, crh.row_status_flag AS crh_row_status_flag, crh.date_received, crh.cc_container_complete_flag, crh.receiving_location_id
FROM latest AS l
LEFT JOIN dbo.container_building AS cb ON cb.container_name = l.container_name AND cb.location_id = 210
LEFT JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_container AS vc ON vc.container_name = l.container_name AND vc.container_building_uid = cb.container_building_uid
LEFT JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_hdr AS vh ON vh.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid = vc.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid
LEFT JOIN dbo.container_receipts_hdr AS crh ON crh.vessel_receipts_container_uid = vc.vessel_receipts_container_uid;

;WITH latest AS
(
    SELECT TOP (1) container_name
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_manual_pipeline_capture_run
    WHERE capture_run_uid <> 2
      AND capture_phase = 'CAPTURE_AFTER_CONTAINER_RECEIPT_APPROVAL'
    ORDER BY capture_run_uid DESC
)
SELECT result_set = 'manual_line_null_summary'
     , vessel_line_count = COUNT(DISTINCT vl.vessel_receipts_line_uid)
     , vl_missing_container_uid = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.vessel_receipts_container_uid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_missing_cbp_uid = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.container_building_po_uid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_missing_container_qty_received = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.container_qty_received IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_missing_po_sku_cost = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.po_sku_cost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_statuses = STRING_AGG(CONVERT(varchar(20), vl.row_status_flag), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY vl.row_status_flag)
     , receipt_line_count = COUNT(DISTINCT crl.container_receipts_line_uid)
     , crl_transfer_flag_nulls = SUM(CASE WHEN crl.transfer_flag IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , crl_transfer_flag_values = STRING_AGG(COALESCE(CONVERT(varchar(20), crl.transfer_flag), '<NULL>'), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY crl.transfer_flag)
FROM latest AS l
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_container AS vc ON vc.container_name = l.container_name
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_line AS vl ON vl.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid = vc.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid
LEFT JOIN dbo.container_receipts_line AS crl ON crl.vessel_receipts_line_uid = vl.vessel_receipts_line_uid;

;WITH latest AS
(
    SELECT TOP (1) container_name
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_manual_pipeline_capture_run
    WHERE capture_run_uid <> 2
      AND capture_phase = 'CAPTURE_AFTER_CONTAINER_RECEIPT_APPROVAL'
    ORDER BY capture_run_uid DESC
)
SELECT result_set = 'manual_document_line_bin_summary'
     , crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid
     , dlb_count = COUNT(dlb.document_no)
     , dlb_qty = SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19, 9), COALESCE(dlb.qty_to_change, dlb.qty_applied, dlb.qty_allocated, 0)))
FROM latest AS l
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_container AS vc ON vc.container_name = l.container_name
JOIN dbo.container_receipts_hdr AS crh ON crh.vessel_receipts_container_uid = vc.vessel_receipts_container_uid
LEFT JOIN dbo.document_line_bin AS dlb ON dlb.document_type = 'CR' AND dlb.document_no = crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid
GROUP BY crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid;

SELECT TOP (10) result_set = 'adf_receipt_builds'
     , rb.*
FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_receipt_build AS rb
ORDER BY rb.created_at DESC;

;WITH adf AS
(
    SELECT TOP (5) *
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_receipt_build
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
)
SELECT result_set = 'adf_line_null_summary'
     , rb.container_name
     , rb.container_receipts_hdr_uid
     , vessel_line_count = COUNT(DISTINCT vl.vessel_receipts_line_uid)
     , vl_missing_container_uid = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.vessel_receipts_container_uid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_missing_cbp_uid = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.container_building_po_uid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_missing_container_qty_received = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.container_qty_received IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , vl_missing_po_sku_cost = SUM(CASE WHEN vl.po_sku_cost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
     , receipt_line_count = COUNT(DISTINCT crl.container_receipts_line_uid)
     , crl_transfer_flag_nulls = SUM(CASE WHEN crl.transfer_flag IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM adf AS rb
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_line AS vl ON vl.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid = rb.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid
LEFT JOIN dbo.container_receipts_line AS crl ON crl.container_receipts_hdr_uid = rb.container_receipts_hdr_uid AND crl.vessel_receipts_line_uid = vl.vessel_receipts_line_uid
GROUP BY rb.container_name, rb.container_receipts_hdr_uid;

;WITH adf AS
(
    SELECT TOP (5) *
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_receipt_build
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
)
SELECT result_set = 'adf_document_line_bin_summary'
     , rb.container_name
     , rb.container_receipts_hdr_uid
     , dlb_count = COUNT(dlb.document_no)
FROM adf AS rb
LEFT JOIN dbo.document_line_bin AS dlb ON dlb.document_type = 'CR' AND dlb.document_no = rb.container_receipts_hdr_uid
GROUP BY rb.container_name, rb.container_receipts_hdr_uid;
